race.comment: BRUMMAGEN (3) three weeks between runs when hunted out from the awkward draw before folding up in the straight with a poor ninth over 1000m at Dubbo. Gets a more economical run here and assess on his good recent performances. Expected to bounce back. DENMAN BANDIT (4) improving gelding fitter after two runs back. Indicated a win was imminent with a close-up fourth over 1000m at Dubbo on March 6. Kept fresh and won well over this track and trip on debut. Shapes as the main danger. SWEDISH GLITTER (7) speedy filly holding her form in weaker grade. Nailed late after going out quickly with a narrow second over 1000m at Warren in BM50 class. Minor place chance. ZAIBATSU (13) deep into the campaign and he gets a much better set-up today. Covered a stack of ground in the run with fading eighth over 1200m at Warren. Value player not to be underestimated.
